name: Two Ingredient Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken Tonight Sweet & Spicy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1 Remove giblets from inside the chicken.
2 Pour 1 cup of sauce into the cavity.
3 Place the chicken breast-down in a crockpot.
4 Pour the remaining sauce over the chicken.
5 Add ½ cup molasses or honey, if desired.
6 Cook until done.
